name: The Unfallen
descriptionSeed: The pure pole: purity that would burn the impure, and is beginning to. The Unfallen have concluded that mercy without judgment is complicity, and that the world is very impure, and they are luminous and certain and entirely without doubt. They are the only people in the world the Blaze respects.
encounterFlavor: The Unfallen, who are beautiful and are weighing you; a purification, in progress, of someone who was mostly good; certainty, which is contagious.
questSeeds: The Unfallen have condemned an entire settlement and the condemnation is not baseless
A Seraph of the Orders agrees with them, publicly, and others are listening

substrateSource.reason: The Orders never abandoned the old frequencies. What the Seraphs kept, kept them.
